headlines.title: U.S. launches ‘self-defense strikes’ against Iran after downing of helicopter
headlines.description: Centcom said it carried out a ‘proportional response to unjustified Iranian aggression’ after President Trump said the Iranian regime shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter. Two crew members were rescued by an unmanned drone boat. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Republican Steve Hilton to face Democrat Xavier Becerra in California governor’s race
headlines.description: NBC News projected Tuesday that Hilton, a former Fox News host, will advance from a crowded all-party primary field to the general election.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Pamela Evette advances to GOP primary runoff against Alan Wilson in South Carolina governor’s race
headlines.description: South Carolina Lt. Gov. Pamela Evette and state Attorney General Alan Wilson advanced to a Republican primary runoff in the race to be the state’s next governor, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham wins GOP primary, defeating wealthy challenger in South Carolina
headlines.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham has won his Republican primary in South Carolina, NBC News projects, after spending millions to secure the nomination.

headlines.title: Karmelo Anthony sentenced to 35 years after murder conviction in Texas high school stabbing
headlines.description: Austin Metcalf was fatally stabbed in April 2025 during a districtwide track meet in Frisco, a Dallas suburb.

headlines.title: Republicans pass bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol through the end of Trump’s term
headlines.description: The legislation, passed only with Republican votes after Democrats demanded reforms to the immigration agencies, now heads to President Trump for his signature.

headlines.title: NASA reveals the new Artemis III crew
headlines.description: NASA has announced the new crew of astronauts that will take part in the Artemis III mission to test new moon landers. Randy Bresnik, Luca Parmitano, Frank Rubio and Andre Douglas are scheduled to launch into Earth orbit next year to test out at least one of the commercially developed lunar landers expected to carry NASA astronauts to the surface of the moon in 2028.

headlines.title: Soccer Fever Kicks in Across US Ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup
headlines.description: In just one week, the 2026 FIFA World Cup is coming to North America for the first time in more than 30 years and the United States men’s national team is looking to stretch the limits of homefield advantage. It will be the final World Cup appearance for Portugal’s Cristiano Ronaldo and possibly Lionel Messi of Argentina as well. NBC’s Stephanie Gosk reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: FDA allows popular sunscreen ingredient long used in Europe and Asia
headlines.description: Advocates and sunscreen enthusiasts have been pushing for the U.S. to allow bemotrizinol for years.

headlines.title: Sports Illustrated Swimsuit Runway Show models say every body is a target online
headlines.description: Sports Illustrated Swimsuit Runway Show models say every body is a target online

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Maine voters set up a Senate showdown: Graham Platner versus Susan Collins
headlines.description: It’s official: Republican Sen. Susan Collins will face Democrat Graham Platner this fall, NBC News projects, in what will be a marquee election in the fight for control of the Senate
